basic_details.job_title: RRB Section Controller Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 119 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Railway Recruitment Boards (RRB), Ministry of Railways
basic_details.short_information: Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs) under the Ministry of Railways have released the Centralised Employment Notification (CEN) No. 03/2026 for the recruitment of Section Controller posts. This recruitment offers a great opportunity for graduates seeking a prestigious government job in Indian Railways. A total of 119 vacancies have been announced across various RRB zones. Eligible candidates can apply online through the official RRB portal before the last date. The selection will be conducted through Computer Based Test (CBT), followed by other stages as per the official notification.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 27-06-2026 Application Start Date: 15-07-2026 (Tentative) Last Date to Apply: 14-08-2026 (23:59 hrs)

qualification.details: Educational Qualification: Candidates must hold a Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline from a recognized university. Age Limit: 20 to 33 years (as on 01.07.2026) Medical Standard: A-2 medical category is required Nationality: Indian Citizen

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT) Aptitude Test (if applicable) Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Click on CEN 03/2026 Section Controller Recruitment link
Register using valid email ID and mobile number

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Release Date: 27-06-2026 Application Start Date: 15-07-2026 (Tentative) Last Date to Apply: 14-08-2026 (23:59 hrs)

content_sections.heading: RRB Section Controller Vacancy 2026 – Post Details
content_sections.text: The Railway Recruitment Board has announced vacancies for Section Controller posts across Indian Railways zones. Section Controller – 119 Posts

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for RRB Section Controller Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Educational Qualification: Candidates must hold a Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline from a recognized university. Age Limit: 20 to 33 years (as on 01.07.2026) Medical Standard: A-2 medical category is required Nationality: Indian Citizen

content_sections.heading: RRB Section Controller Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Computer Based Test (CBT) Aptitude Test (if applicable) Document Verification Medical Examination

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RRB Section Controller Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official RRB website Click on CEN 03/2026 Section Controller Recruitment link Register using valid email ID and mobile number Fill the application form carefully Upload required documents Pay application fee (if applicable) Submit and print application form

faq.question: Q1. What is RRB Section Controller Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a railway recruitment drive conducted by RRB for Section Controller posts under CEN 03/2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released?
faq.answer: A total of 119 vacancies have been announced.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a graduation degree in any discipline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit?
Q5. What is the salary of Section Controller?
Q6. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: CBT, aptitude test (if applicable), document verification, and medical test.
